articles.title: Uncle Sam is wrong, India and China are doing their bit to fight climate change
articles.summary: It is true that there is an increase in carbon emission by India and China due to homegrown consumption and lack of infrastructure. But let s keep in mind that India s carbon emissions per capita are still 10 times lower and China s is half of that compared to the US.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Wockhardt shares surge over 12% to 9-month high as company swings to profit in Q4
articles.summary: Wockhardt's shares surged 12.55% to ₹1,604 following a profitable Q4FY26 with a net profit of ₹164 crore. Strong revenue growth from biotech and emerging markets fueled performance, with full-year revenue rising to ₹3,373 crore and EBITDA increasing by 51%.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Marico Q4 results: Net profit rises 14% YoY to ₹391 crore, ₹4 per share dividend announced
articles.summary: Marico Q4 results: Net profit rises 14% YoY to ₹391 crore, ₹4 per share dividend announced. The stock opened at ₹789.05 apiece today, as compared to previous close of ₹784.55 on Monday.

articles.title: Why investors are cautious despite Ather’s revenue surge

articles.title: USD vs INR: Indian Rupee may depreciate to 96 per US dollar amid rising crude oil prices, global risk
articles.summary: The Indian rupee fell 20 paise to 95.43 against the US dollar amid geopolitical tensions and rising Brent crude prices, impacting oil-importing nations. Experts warn that prolonged currency weakness could worsen India's current account deficit and trigger further capital outflows.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: PNB Q4 results: Profit up 14.4% to ₹5,225 crore; NII, NIM drop on a YoY basis
articles.summary: PNB Q4 results: PNB's Q4 profit saw a 14.41% YoY rise. However, NII and NIM declined on a year-over-year basis. Operating profit rose by 10.7% YoY.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: US 30-Year Yield Hits 5% on Oil Surge, Higher Borrowing Outlook
articles.summary: Treasuries fell, sending 30-year yields to the highest since July, as a surge in oil prices stoked inflation fears while higher government borrowing estimates fueled concerns about increased supply.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: BHEL stock in the spotlight after an electrifying Q4 show
articles.summary: BHEL’s shares trade at about 43 times its estimated FY27 earnings per share. All eyes will now be on the pace of execution and margin accretion over the next few quarters.

articles.title: SIP mania remains strong despite poor show from Nifty bulls: What could impact investor confidence going ahead?
articles.summary: Nifty 50 has risen even less than 2% in the last 24 months, challenging investor patience at a time when the global market performance has remained strong. Asian peers and US markets are trading at or close to record high levels.

articles.title: Hero MotoCorp Q4 Results 2026 LIVE: Auto major trades flat ahead of earnings, dividend — What to expect?
articles.summary: Hero MotoCorp Q4 Results 2026 LIVE: Brokerages expect Hero MotoCorp to post a strong set of numbers, driven by high volumes, a rise in average selling prices and export market expansion. According to their estimates, both revenue and profit could jump in double-digits on a year-on-year basis.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: M&M Q4 results 2026: Profit jumps 42% YoY to ₹4,667.57 crore; declares a final dividend of ₹33
articles.summary: M&M Q4 results 2026: Profit jumped nearly 42% YoY to ₹4,667.57 crore, while revenue from operations increased by nearly 29% to ₹54,891.55 crore. M&M's board approved a final dividend of ₹33 per share, with a face value of ₹5 each, for FY26.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Oil Edges Lower Following Spike With Hormuz Stalemate in Focus
articles.summary: Oil edged lower, paring Monday’s gain, as traders tracked tensions in the Middle East after fresh clashes between the US and Iran.

articles.title: UBS cuts India’s FY27 GDP growth forecast to 6.2% amid oil price shock, weak monsoon; expects RBI rate hike in H2FY27
articles.summary: UBS has revised its India GDP growth forecast downward to 6.2% for FY27, from its earlier estimate of 6.7%, factoring in higher crude oil prices, supply-side disruptions, and expectations of a below-normal monsoon.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Vodafone Idea, HFCL, JP Power, HCC, Meesho, Ola Electric Mobility among the most traded stocks today, 5 May 2026

articles.title: BSE SME stock hits 5% upper circuit despite Indian stock market sell-off
articles.summary: HRS Aluglaze's stock hit the 5% upper circuit at ₹225.75 on May 5, despite market declines. The company secured a ₹1.31 crore work order for aluminium windows from PSP Projects, enhancing its order book and revenue visibility over the next four months.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Amazon logistics push rattles Delhivery, stock drops over 4%
articles.summary: Delhivery shares fell over 4% following Amazon's introduction of its bundled logistics service, ASCS. This move signals intensified competition in the logistics sector, causing significant declines in stock prices of other logistics companies such as FedEx and UPS.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: NSE introduces Electronic Gold Receipts: What are they, how to trade and benefits explained
articles.summary: EGRs is backed by physical gold; the investors, at their discretion, can surrender the EGRs and take physical delivery of the corresponding quantity and quality of gold.

articles.title: Healthcare stock Park Medi World hits record high despite stock market crash
articles.summary: Park Medi World share price has gained 23% in one month and has rallied 55% in three months. The hospital stock has delivered 62% returns on a year-to-date (YTD) basis.

articles.summary: M&M Q4 Results LIVE: The company posted a consolidated net profit of ₹4,667.57 crore, marking a 41.65% increase compared to ₹3,295.17 crore in the corresponding quarter last year. The company also declared a final dividend of ₹33 per share.

articles.title: Gold, silver prices today: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold, 999 silver on 5 May in Delhi, Mumbai and Kolkata
articles.summary: Gold and silver prices today show marginal gains in gold and a sharp decline in silver across major cities, amid geopolitical tensions, oil route risks and weak equity sentiment. The focus now shifts to developments in the Middle East and how the US-Iran war unfolds in the days to come.

articles.title: Dynacons Systems share price jumps 18% after RBI order worth ₹750.82 crore
articles.summary: Dynacons Systems shares rose 18% on 5 May after securing a ₹750.82 crore order from the RBI for a private cloud infrastructure project. The contract spans five years, involving design, implementation, and ongoing support for a new data centre in Odisha.

articles.title: Amba Auto Sales share price makes flat debut, lists at ₹134.50 on NSE SME
articles.summary: Amba Auto Sales share price made flat debut in the Indian stock market on Tuesday, 5 May. The stock listed at ₹134.50 on NSE SME, as compared to the IPO price of ₹135.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Sobha share price rallies 9.5% after strong Q4 as profit doubles, sales hit record levels
articles.summary: Sobha Ltd shares rose 9.5% after reporting a 124% increase in Q4 net profit to ₹91.83 crore, with revenue up 60.2% to ₹1,908 crore. The company also announced a ₹6 dividend and record sales bookings of ₹8,136 crore for FY26.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Tata Technologies share price jumps 9% after Q4 results. Do you own?

articles.title: Multibagger drone stock ideaForge Technology share price jumps 8% to 52-week high on strong Q4 results
articles.summary: ideaForge Technology shares surged over 8% to a 52-week high of ₹794.40 after reporting a net profit of ₹60 crore for March, a significant turnaround from last year's loss. Revenue rose over 600%, driving strong investor confidence and a six-session rally.

articles.title: BJP’s Bengal win sparks rally in state-linked stocks, but can it last?
articles.summary: BJP’s win in West Bengal triggered a sharp rally in state-linked stocks on hopes of policy reset, but experts caution that sentiment alone won’t drive durable economic gains.

articles.title: Silver price today steady near ₹2.44 lakh/kg as Middle East tensions, Fed cues keep investors cautious
articles.summary: Silver prices remained steady amid escalating US-Iran tensions. In India, MCX silver held at ₹2,43,927 per kg, while international spot silver rose 0.1% to $72.76 per ounce. Geopolitical risks support silver, but a firm interest rate outlook limits price gains.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Recode Studios IPO Day 1: SME IPO opens today; check GMP, subscription status, and other details
articles.summary: Recode Studios launched its IPO on May 5, aiming to raise ₹44.59 crore with a price band of ₹150-158 per share. The IPO includes fresh shares and an offer for sale, with allotment expected on May 8 and listing on BSE SME on May 12.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Power Grid: steady returns ride power boom, but debt clouds outlook

articles.summary: Gold price today: Gold rate climbed on the MCX on Tuesday (5 May) morning, largely due to value buying, but strong dollar, inflation concerns capped gains for the yellow metal.

articles.title: Rupee hits record low of 95.39 against US dollar amid elevated crude oil prices
articles.summary: The Indian rupee fell to a record low of 95.39 per dollar on May 5 due to US-Iranian strikes and rising oil prices, increasing dollar demand. Analysts suggest the Reserve Bank of India may need to implement measures to stabilize the currency amidst ongoing economic pressures.

articles.summary: Stocks to buy for short term: Experts recommend six stocks, including Crompton Greaves, GMR Airports, and Polycab India, for the next 1-2 weeks, highlighting their potential target prices and stop losses.

articles.title: India among most resilient as global shocks test emerging markets: Moody’s Ratings
articles.summary: India and Thailand are well placed to manage future shocks because monetary policy frameworks are clear and predictable, inflation expectations are well anchored, and exchange rates can adjust when needed, Moody’s Ratings said.

articles.title: India’s fertilizer subsidy reaches ₹2.17 trillion in FY26 due to West Asia war, may rise by a fifth in FY27
articles.summary: As the war in West Asia disrupts supply chains, India's fertilizer subsidy may exceed ₹2.17 trillion in FY27. This trend raises concerns about fiscal discipline and food inflation.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: RBI reshuffles top deck: New DG Rohit Jain takes charge, portfolios realigned
articles.summary: Rohit Jain has been appointed deputy governor of the Reserve Bank of India, leading to a portfolio reshuffle among governors. The changes, effective 4 May, aim to enhance oversight of fintech and adapt to evolving financial priorities amid global volatility.

articles.title: Centre plans 3.25 mn ha shift to chemical-free farming by FY31
articles.summary: The department of expenditure in coordination with the agriculture ministry, is drafting a proposal to create 65,000 clusters of 50 hectares each under the National Mission on Natural Farming
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Indian private sector new order growth quickens in April but remains slowest in 4 years: PMI survey shows
articles.summary: After losing some momentum in March due to West Asia conflict, growth across India's private sector expanded at a quicker rate at the start of new fiscal year in April.
articles.label: BEARISH
